description: Clean utility function addition — should approve
diff:
--- a/src/utils.py
+++ b/src/utils.py
@@ -20,0 +21,6 @@
+def clamp(value: float, min_val: float, max_val: float) -> float:
+    """Clamp value between min_val and max_val."""
+    if value < min_val:
+        return min_val
+    if value > max_val:
+        return max_val
+    return value

--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/manager.py
@@ -0,0 +1,60 @@
+class ApplicationManager:
+    def __init__(self):
+        self.db = PostgresClient()
+        self.cache = RedisClient()
+        self.email = SMTPClient()
+        self.logger = Logger()
+        self.auth = AuthService()
+
+    def authenticate_user(self, username, password):
+        user = self.db.query(f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = "{username}"')
+        if user and user.password == password:
+            return self.auth.create_token(user)
+
+    def send_welcome_email(self, user):
+        self.email.send(user.email, 'Welcome!')
+
+    def cache_result(self, key, value):
+        self.cache.set(key, value)
+
+    def log_event(self, event):
+        self.logger.info(event)

description: random module used for security token generation
diff:
--- a/src/tokens.py
+++ b/src/tokens.py
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 import random
+import string
 
 def generate_reset_token():
-    return secrets.token_hex(32)
+    return ''.join(random.choices(string.ascii_letters, k=32))

description: Well-structured class addition with proper injection — approve
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/email_service.py
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+from typing import Protocol
+
+
+class EmailSender(Protocol):
+    def send(self, to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> None: ...
+
+
+class EmailService:
+    """Sends transactional emails via an injected sender."""
+
+    def __init__(self, sender: EmailSender) -> None:
+        self._sender = sender
+
+    def send_welcome(self, user_email: str, username: str) -> None:
+        """Send a welcome email to a new user."""
+        self._sender.send(
+            to=user_email,
+            subject='Welcome!',
+            body=f'Hello {username}, welcome to the platform.',
+        )
